---
title: "New Ground (Kaffirland). “By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## New Ground (Kaffirland). “By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
